element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Fundamental mechanic for airborne enemy engagement
High-risk melee option for airborne targets
Risk-reward mechanic requiring aerial timing to color-shift bells
Limited-stock resource attack requiring careful deployment
Persistent strategic choice affecting hitbox and offense patterns
Replaces traditional lives; encourages aggressive play with safety margin
Tactical resource transfer between players; cooperation incentive
High-risk tactical maneuver using partner as weapon
Seven cumulative boss fights testing accumulated skill and pattern recognition

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating through 7-stage progression with boss gates; maintains upbeat rhythm aligned to idol-influenced soundtrack; tension cycles tighten toward late stages

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Bell power-ups positioned as optional aerial targets requiring deliberate intercept; color-shifting adds discovery element

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of core mechanics (gun, bombs, punches) with manageable enemy density; bell power-ups presented as learning opportunities
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy formation complexity; ship replica stock management becomes strategic; boss patterns demand pattern recognition
difficulty_curve.late_game: Cumulative mechanical mastery required; denser enemy waves; boss difficulty escalates; life meter management critical in single-player
notable_spikes: Stage 1 boss introduces boss pattern learning curve
Mid-stage transitions with dense enemy formations
Stage 7 final boss as culmination of all mechanics

notable_level_patterns.description: Linear progression through 7 stages, each concluding with a boss encounter. Stages feature mixed airborne and land-based enemies requiring dual attack strategies
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Stage 1 (tutorial stage introducing core mechanics before first boss)

notable_level_patterns.description: Color-shifting bells act as risk-reward targets suspended in airspace; shooting them while airborne changes their color and effects, creating skill-based resource gathering
Moments designed to encourage co-op tactics: life sharing during damage spikes, simultaneous target focus, positioned ship-as-projectile opportunities
